name: EdgeTX Companion
description: Desktop companion for EdgeTX radios: manage models, edit settings, run the simulator, and flash firmware.
notes: Zip wraps an NSIS installer (companion-windows-<ver>.exe) run silently via /S /D={dest}. The installer manifest is requireAdministrator, so installing shows a UAC prompt (RC Central retries it elevated); the installed companion.exe is asInvoker and launches without one. Both the download URL and the inner installer filename embed the version, so both rot on the next release - bump them together.
